feed.title: Alberto Corrales Garcia
feed.subtitle: Software Development, Architecture, Cloud and Technology.

entry.title: Run docker on windows easily without docker desktop

link.title: Run docker on windows easily without docker desktop

entry.summary: Introduction During the last years few, Docker has become one of the most popular technologies for vitualizing all kind of services. Until last year, if you were working with Docker, you were probably using the Docker Desktop application, which nicely installs and manages your docker containers, images, kubernetes, etc. However, at the beginning of this year, Docker changed their policy and n...

entry.title: Migrating your blog from Blogspot to Github pages

link.title: Migrating your blog from Blogspot to Github pages

entry.summary: Introduction I’ve recently migrated my blog from Blogspot to Github Pages. The main reasons to do are: I wanted to use markdown as language to edit my posts. Markdown is becoming the standard to write documentation, so I would like to have my posts in a format that I can easily migrate or post in other platforms. Blogspot is a great tool for editing text, but it is not so good for adding...

entry.title: Circuit Breakers to handle failures in serverless applications

link.title: Circuit Breakers to handle failures in serverless applications

entry.summary: Introduction When you are developing micro-services, you might find that there might be some dependencies which could fail or be temporary unavailable. Examples of these dependencies are calls to other services, data stores, etc. These dependencies might be unavailable for multiple reasons such as maintenance, throttling, etc. The idea behind the circuit breaker pattern is wrapping the depend...

entry.title: AWS assuming role + MFA with pulumi (and other applications)

link.title: AWS assuming role + MFA with pulumi (and other applications)

entry.summary: Introduction In AWS, managing your IAM in a centralized account is a good practice, so then you can assume a role to access to other accounts without need of duplicating users. You can find more info about this approach in this article. In addition, for security reasons, it is highly recommended to enable MFA (Multi-factor Authentication), so you need a device to generate a temporary code to ...

entry.title: Performance improvement for EventSourcing/CQRS with Snapshots

link.title: Performance improvement for EventSourcing/CQRS with Snapshots

entry.summary: Introduction to Event Sourcing and CQRS The fundamental idea of Event Sourcing is ensuring that every change to the state of an application is captured in an event object, and that these event objects are themselves stored in the sequence they were applied for the same lifetime as the application state itself. (For more information about Event Sourcing I recommend this post written by Martin F...
